When Maggie measured the water temperature in each pan after 15 minutes, which pan do you think held the hottest water? Explain your answer.
reference_answer: C. Black absorbs more heat (energy) than white. Pan C has the most dark surface area so C would heat up the fastest and have the highest temperature.
student_answer: C. Because it has the most black disks. Black absorbs heat.
label: correct
student_answer_noisy: C.Becauseithas thhemost black disks.Blackabsorbs heat.
